name: AI Invoice Data Extractor
description: Fetches emails from Gmail that contain invoices, uses Claude AI to extract structured data (amounts, dates, vendors, line items) from the email content, and saves the extracted invoice data to Google Sheets. Adapted from n8n's LlamaParse invoice extraction workflow.

source.originalName: Invoice data extraction with LlamaParse and OpenAI

gmailKey.description: Gmail connection key for fetching invoice emails

sheetsKey.description: Google Sheets connection key for saving extracted data

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for posting extraction summary

spreadsheetId.description: Google Sheets spreadsheet ID to save invoice data

sheetName.description: Sheet/tab name within the spreadsheet (default: Invoices)

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID to post the extraction summary

searchQuery.default: subject:(invoice OR receipt OR payment) newer_than:7d
searchQuery.description: Gmail search query for finding invoice emails

maxEmails.description: Maximum number of emails to process (default: 10)

code.source:
const messages = $.steps.fetchInvoiceEmails.response.messages || [];
return { messageIds: messages.map(m => m.id).filter(Boolean).slice(0, 10) };

steps.name: Fetch details for each invoice email
Compile email content for invoice extraction
Build Claude prompt for invoice extraction
Build Google Sheets rows from extracted invoices
Save invoice data to Google Sheets
Build Slack Block Kit extraction summary
